acceptance_criteria_checked: Smooth scrolling between sections functions correctly.
No horizontal overflow exists on mobile devices.
Environment variables (`DATABASE_URI`, `DATABASE_TABLE_PREFIX`) are correctly documented for Vercel deployment.
notes: Assembled Hero, About, Gallery, Media, Gigs, and Contact components into app/page.tsx sequentially. Added scroll-smooth to HTML and overflow-x-hidden to body in app/layout.tsx for smooth scrolling and mobile responsiveness without horizontal scroll issues. Verified build and lint checks pass. Documented Vercel required environment variables in README.md.
